Metadata.title: Villa Lola — Coastal Villa in Menorca
Metadata.description: A charming 3-bedroom Menorcan style villa in Cap d'Artrutx with sea views, private pool, and breathtaking sunsets. Your coastal escape in the Balearics.
Metadata.ogDescription: 3-bedroom villa with sea views, private pool, and sunset terrace in Menorca. Book your coastal escape at Villa Lola.

About.label: About the Villa
About.title: Welcome to Villa Lola
About.p1: Perched in the peaceful neighbourhood of Cap d'Artrutx on Menorca's stunning southwest coast, Villa Lola is a charming two-storey Menorcan style villa that captures the essence of island living.
About.p2: With a private pool, Mediterranean garden, and a terrace offering sweeping sea views and unforgettable sunsets, Villa Lola is the perfect retreat for families and friends looking for tranquillity and beauty.
About.p3: Just a short stroll from Cala en Bosc beach, local restaurants, and the iconic Cap d'Artrutx lighthouse, you'll find everything you need for a relaxed and memorable Menorcan holiday.

Spaces.label: Our Spaces
Spaces.title: Every Corner Tells a Story
Spaces.subtitle: Discover the spaces that make Villa Lola your perfect coastal retreat

pool.title: Private Pool
pool.description: A sparkling private pool surrounded by Mediterranean landscaping — your own oasis under the Menorcan sun.

seaViews.title: Terrace & Sea Views
seaViews.description: A spectacular terrace with panoramic sea views — the perfect spot to watch the sun set over the Mediterranean.

garden.title: Mediterranean Garden
garden.description: Lush gardens with native plants and shaded corners, creating a peaceful natural retreat.

bbq.title: Outdoor BBQ & Dining
bbq.description: A fully equipped BBQ area with outdoor dining — perfect for long summer evenings under the stars.

living.title: Living Room
living.description: A bright, airy living space with comfortable furnishings and air conditioning throughout.

kitchen.title: Fully Equipped Kitchen
kitchen.description: A modern kitchen with everything you need to prepare local recipes or your favourite meals.

bedrooms.title: 3 Bedrooms
bedrooms.description: Three beautifully appointed bedrooms with quality linens, air conditioning, and natural light.

bathrooms.title: 2 Bathrooms
bathrooms.description: Two well-appointed bathrooms with modern fixtures and complimentary toiletries.

Gallery.label: Gallery
Gallery.title: A Glimpse of Paradise
Gallery.subtitle: Explore the beauty of Villa Lola through our photo gallery

Location.label: Location
Location.title: Perfectly Placed in Cap d'Artrutx
Location.subtitle: Everything you need is just moments away

beach.title: Cala en Bosc Beach
beach.description: A beautiful sandy beach with crystal-clear waters, water sports, and beachfront restaurants

restaurants.title: Restaurants & Shops
restaurants.description: A variety of restaurants, cafés, and shops within easy walking distance

lighthouse.title: Cap d'Artrutx Lighthouse
lighthouse.description: One of Menorca's most beautiful lighthouses — a stunning spot to watch the sunset every evening

camiCavalls.title: Camí de Cavalls
camiCavalls.description: Direct access to Menorca's iconic 185 km coastal hiking trail

ciutadella.title: Ciutadella
ciutadella.description: Menorca's historic western capital with a medieval old town, harbour, and vibrant nightlife

airport.title: Mahón Airport
airport.description: Well-connected airport with direct flights from major European cities

Activities.label: Things to Do
Activities.title: Discover Menorca
Activities.subtitle: An island of endless experiences awaits you

beaches.title: Beach Hopping
beaches.description: Explore Menorca's stunning calas — from the turquoise waters of Cala Macarella to the golden sands of Son Bou.

hiking.title: Camí de Cavalls
hiking.description: Walk the ancient 185 km coastal path that circles the entire island, offering breathtaking views at every turn.

towns.title: Ciutadella & Mahón
towns.description: Visit the island's two charming cities — Ciutadella with its medieval old town and Mahón with its natural harbour.

gastronomy.title: Local Gastronomy
gastronomy.description: Savour fresh seafood, traditional caldereta de langosta, Mahón cheese, and local wines at authentic restaurants.

watersports.title: Water Sports
watersports.description: Kayaking, snorkelling, paddleboarding, and sailing in the crystal-clear Mediterranean waters.

Booking.title: Reserve Your Coastal Escape
Booking.subtitle: Book directly for the best rates, or find us on your preferred platform
Booking.directBenefit: Save on platform fees — best price guaranteed
